papers.title_en: On Reconstructing a Convex Polygon from Partial Information
papers.authors: Alexander Baumann, Therese Biedl, Mahmoud Elashmawi, Simon D. Fink, Maria Saumell, André Schulz
papers.evidence: 通过优化匹配特征来调整多边形边界
papers.tldr: 凸多边形重建问题要求依据给定的几何特征（如有序边长序列或内角序列）重新构造凸多边形。本文针对仅指定一个或两个特征集的所有可能场景进行了系统性研究，通过设计高效算法和证明计算复杂性，厘清了各场景的求解难度。结果展示了部分场景存在多项式时间测试算法，而另一些场景则被证明为NP-hard，从而填补了理论空白。同时，论文提出了大量引人入胜的开放问题，为未来探索指明了方向。这项工作对计算几何领域具有重要指导意义。
papers.abstract_en: The reconstruction problem asks to construct a (convex) polygon that has a specified set of features, such as an ordered set of edge-lengths or an ordered set of polygon-angles. In this paper, we do a systematic exploration of the reconstruction problem in all scenarios where one or two sets of features have been specified. Some of these scenarios were well-studied already, for some we develop testing-algorithms and/or hardness results, and many give rise to interesting open problems for future study.

papers.title_en: Faber Krahn inequality of Robin eigenvalue of the Weighted Laplacian
papers.authors: Daguang Chen, Kui Wang, Anqiang Zhu
papers.evidence: 证明加权Laplacian在Robin边界条件下最优域为球体，直接优化边界形状。
papers.tldr: 本文研究加权拉普拉斯算子在Robin边界条件下的第一特征值优化问题，将经典Faber-Krahn不等式从Dirichlet情形推广至更一般的边界条件。针对欧氏空间R^n和双曲空间H^n，利用对称重排等方法证明了两个Faber-Krahn型不等式，表明在体积约束下，当区域为中心在原点的球时第一Robin特征值达到最小。该结果揭示了加权拉普拉斯算子谱几何中Robin边界与原点对称性的本质联系，拓宽了谱等周不等式的适用范围，对偏微分方程和几何分析具有理论意义。
papers.abstract_en: In this paper, we prove two Faber-Krahn-type inequalities for the first eigenvalue of the weighted Laplacian with Robin boundary conditions on $\mathbb{R}^{n}$ and $\mathbb{H}^{n}$. In both settings, the optimal domain is shown to be a ball centered at the origin.

papers.title_en: HPG-Diff: Hierarchical physics-guided diffusion with differentiable connectivity constraints for topology optimization
papers.authors: Jinbo Yang, Mingyue Yuan, Boyuan Zhang, Yoshifumi Kitamura, Shikai Jing
papers.evidence: 拓扑优化在物理引导下调整材料边界
papers.tldr: 深度生成模型虽能加速拓扑优化设计探索，但缺乏物理引导，导致在新边界条件下泛化性差且易产生浮动材料。HPG-Diff框架通过层次化物理引导策略将预计算物理特征与去噪过程对齐，并引入基于热传导的可微分连通性约束，有效抑制浮动材料。实验表明，分布内和分布外平均合规误差分别降至0.87%和5.29%，浮动材料比率降至2.90%和2.44%。该方法为物理一致的拓扑优化提供了新范式，并初步验证了轻量微调跨域迁移的潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Deep generative models offer a promising paradigm for topology optimization, enabling rapid design exploration. However, these approaches lack intrinsic physics guidance, often leading to poor generalizability across unseen boundary conditions and the formation of floating material artifacts. To address these limitations, we propose Hierarchical Physics-Guided Diffusion (HPG-Diff), a novel diffusion framework that enforces physics consistency through two synergistic mechanisms. First, we introduce a hierarchical physics-guided strategy that aligns different precomputed physics features with the denoising process, guiding material distribution toward optimal load paths to enhance generalizability. Second, we propose a floating material suppression loss as a differentiable connectivity constraint inspired by thermal conduction to improve topological connectivity. By simulating a virtual heat propagation process from load positions, this mechanism explicitly penalizes floating material during training. Quantitative evaluations demonstrate that HPG-Diff achieves average compliance errors of 0.87% (in-distribution) and 5.29% (out-of-distribution), while reducing floating material ratios to 2.90% and 2.44%, respectively. Furthermore, case studies on a 3:1 rectangular domain, including cantilever and bridge benchmarks, provide preliminary evidence that lightweight LoRA fine-tuning with a small dataset can support the adaptation of HPG-Diff to rectangular non-square domains.

papers.title_en: Nonlocal minimal surfaces are generically unique, and smooth in one extra dimension
papers.authors: Serena Dipierro, Xavier Fernández-Real, Enrico Valdinoci
papers.evidence: 具有指定边界数据的极小曲面问题
papers.tldr: 分数阶Plateau问题中，s-极小集在给定外部数据下的极小化通常不具有唯一性，且当维数超过临界值时会出现奇点。针对这一挑战，本文研究了极小化子对变化外部数据的响应。结果表明，沿着任何严格递增的外部数据族，极小化子非唯一的情形至多只在可数多个参数上发生，因此唯一性是一种通有性质。进一步，作者证明，通过对系统施加任意小的扰动，可以使内部正则性理论的有效维数提高一维，从而将光滑性推广到更高维度。这些发现深刻揭示了非局部极小曲面在一般设定下的泛型唯一性，并指出正则性可通过扰动提升，为相关几何分析提供了重要途径。该工作不仅解决了唯一性在何种程度上成立的问题，也为突破正则性障碍提供了建设性方法。
papers.abstract_en: We study the fractional Plateau problem for $s$-minimal sets with prescribed exterior datum. For fixed exterior data, minimizers need not be unique, and singularities may occur beyond the critical dimension. We first prove a generic uniqueness theorem: along any strictly increasing family of exterior data, nonuniqueness occurs for at most countably many parameters. We then show that one can make arbitrarily small perturbations for which the interior regularity theory improves by one dimension.

papers.title_en: From Ham-Sandwich to Centerpoints: Semialgebraic Algorithms for Cutting Polytopal Measures
papers.authors: Marie-Charlotte Brandenburg, Jesús A. De Loera, Chiara Meroni
papers.evidence: 寻找多面体测度最优切割超平面的算法，与决策边界优化相关
papers.tldr: 针对凸多面体测度，解决了计算几何中火腿三明治切割与中心点定理的算法问题。关键洞察是测度的帽体积函数在超平面空间的自然分解下呈分片有理，从而将任意比例切割转化为半代数可行性问题。在固定维数下，首次给出多项式时间算法，不仅能判断切割存在性，还可完整描述解集并支持采样或枚举。进一步推广到中心横截定理，证明中心点集恰为1/(d+1)水平浮体，提供了统一的半代数算法视角。
papers.abstract_en: We design exact algorithms for the ham-sandwich and centerpoint theorems for polytopal measures. Our key observation is that the cap-volume function of such a measure, i.e., the volume cut off by a halfspace, is piecewise rational on a natural decomposition of the space of oriented hyperplanes. This lets us recast prescribed-proportion cutting problems as semialgebraic feasibility problems. For fixed ambient dimension, this yields polynomial-time algorithms to decide the existence of cuts, describe the full solution set, and sample or enumerate solutions. We extend this framework to the center transversal theorem, showing that spaces of deep affine flats are semialgebraic, which holds for centerpoints. We further show that the set of centerpoints of a convex polytope coincides with its floating body at level $1/(d+1)$, a useful semialgebraic description.

papers.title_en: Mass weighting algorithm optimizes Fourier-based physics-informed neural network in adhesive contact mechanics
papers.authors: Yunong Zhou, Kaifeng Huang, Chaofan Du, Yang Xu, Hengxu Song
papers.evidence: 质量加权算法优化傅里叶基物理信息神经网络求解粘着接触力学边界值问题
papers.tldr: 在弹性接触力学模拟中，物理信息神经网络因弹性核随波数线性增长，短波模式主导梯度更新，导致收敛缓慢。本研究提出质量加权谱预处理策略，在傅里叶空间重新加权位移梯度，放大低波数成分并内置低通滤波。应用于黏附线接触问题，仅需400次Adam迭代即达到机器零残差，比传统方法损失低三个数量级，且位移与应力场与GFMD解定量一致。方法直接在均匀网格上最小化标量能量，无需格林函数积分，可自然推广至二维粗糙表面，为接触力学高效模拟开辟新途径。
papers.abstract_en: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) for elastic contact mechanics suffer from a spectral stiffness imbalance,that is, the elastic kernel grows linearly with wave number, causing short-wavelength modes to dominate gradient updates and stall convergence of the macroscopic deformation. We introduce a spectral preconditioning strategy that reweights displacement gradients in Fourier space before back-propagation, amplifying low wavenumber components through a mass weighting (MW) function while suppressing sub-grid noise via a built-in low-pass filter. Applied to adhesive line contact problems, the mass weighted PINN reaches machine-zero residual loss within 400 Adam iterations for specified benchmark, whereas the reference benchmark stalls at three orders of magnitude higher loss. The converged displacement and contact stress fields agree quantitatively with Green's function molecular dynamics (GFMD) solutions for both smooth Hertz contact at pressures spanning tension to compression and rough surfaces with roughness covering several decades of wavelength. The method operates directly on a uniform real-space grid, requires no explicit Green's function integration or quadrature rules, and is formulated entirely in terms of minimising a scalar energy function. Extension to two-dimensional rough surfaces is direct, as both the Fourier elastic energy and the spectral preconditioner depend only on the wave-number magnitude.
